craigslist.title: Pristine Single-Level Traditional Rental with Climate-Controlled Creative Suite
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Tucked away into the scenic, peaceful hills of the Oak Haven subdivision, this immaculate single-story detached property represents an incredible residential opportunity. Melding classic Mid-South architecture with functional updates, it offers an idyllic setting for an intentional lifestyle. The front elevation features a clean brick profile surrounded by mature shade trees that provide seasonal beauty. A welcoming approach guides guests toward a front entry door that opens directly into a wide-open interior footprint. The expansive floor plan spans 1,442 square feet of versatile space. Sheetrock ceilings and clean walls provide a bright backdrop for personalized interior decorations, accented by a blend of plush carpeting and sleek tile.  A vast eat-in kitchen makes meal prep highly efficient. The extensive countertop layouts are mirrored by an oversized pantry closet that easily keeps your dry goods, small appliances, and household staples perfectly sorted. A separate, dedicated laundry room is adjacent to the primary cooking zone. This intentional placement isolates operational machine noise from the main living rooms while keeping clothing care highly accessible. The bedroom wings feature generous proportions and deep closets. The primary bedroom serves as a quiet sanctuary, complete with a private en-suite bathroom, while the additional bedrooms enjoy bright windows and ceiling fans. The former garage has been meticulously converted into a premier bonus area. Fully climate-controlled, it stands ready to serve as a fourth bedroom alternative, a media viewing room, or a distraction-free home office space. A sloped, generous lot provides excellent drainage and panoramic backyard views. The outdoor space gives residents room for patio furniture setups, container gardening, or simple weekend relaxation. Located precisely 18 minutes outside of metropolitan Little Rock, this Sherwood location provides a peaceful escape from urban congestion while ensuring an effortless daily commute via nearby highway corridors.
